changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE xuexiziliao ADD COLUMN jiage int DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '资料价格(元)'

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ziliaogoumai` ( `id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '主键', `addtime` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', `dingdanhao` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '订单号', `xuexiziliaoid` bigint DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '资料ID', `ziliaobiaoti` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '资料标题', `jiage` int DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '价格(元)', `yonghuzhanghao` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '用户账号', `yonghuxingming` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '用户姓名', `zhuangtai` varchar(200) DEFAULT '待支付' COMMENT '订单状态', `zhifufangshi` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '支付方式', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8 COMMENT='资料购买';

changeSet.author: system
